results.artifact: 1996 lending portfolio executive dashboard with KPI, monthly loan activity, status composition, and duration-based loan-size view.

chart_spec.layout_intent: Top row KPI full width, middle row monthly line and stacked status bar, bottom row duration bar.

results.artifact: Regional risk dashboard comparing Czech regions on client base, active-loan exposure, finished-loan default rate, and salary context.

charts.title: Regional Risk Summary
metrics: COUNT(loan.loan_id) WHERE loan.status = 'B' / COUNT(loan.loan_id) WHERE loan.status IN ('A','B')

charts.title: Default Rate by Region
metrics: COUNT(loan.loan_id) WHERE loan.status = 'B' / COUNT(loan.loan_id) WHERE loan.status IN ('A','B')

chart_spec.layout_intent: Wide regional summary table above a horizontal default-rate ranking bar.

results.artifact: Credit-card product overview linking card issuance volume and type mix to 1997 card-withdrawal activity.

chart_spec.layout_intent: Two aligned line charts stacked for trend comparison, with card-type mix as a side panel.

results.artifact: Transaction-mix dashboard for 1997-1998 showing cash-flow direction, purpose-code share, and balance trend.

charts.title: Monthly Transaction Amount by Type
filters: EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CAST(trans.date AS DATE)) IN (1997, 1998)

charts.title: Transaction Share by Purpose Code
filters: EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CAST(trans.date AS DATE)) IN (1997, 1998)

charts.title: Average Post-Transaction Balance Trend
filters: EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CAST(trans.date AS DATE)) IN (1997, 1998)

chart_spec.layout_intent: Full-width monthly stacked bar on top, pie and balance trend below for composition and outcome context.

results.artifact: Client-demographics dashboard with age distribution, gender mix, loan-size relationship, and top districts by client count.

charts.title: Client Age Distribution
dimensions: age_years = 1998 - EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CAST(client.birth_date AS DATE))

charts.title: Age vs Loan Amount for Loan-Holding Clients
dimensions: age_years = 1998 - EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CAST(client.birth_date AS DATE))
filters: clients joined through disp/account to loan

chart_spec.layout_intent: Distribution and mix charts on top, scatter and top-district table below for drill-down.

results.artifact: Quarterly 1997 transaction-volume dashboard for the five largest districts, with district-specific trends and a combined comparison.

charts.title: Quarterly Transaction Amount - Largest District 1
filters: district.A2 in top 5 by CAST(district.A4 AS INTEGER)

charts.title: Quarterly Transaction Amount - Largest District 2
filters: district.A2 in top 5 by CAST(district.A4 AS INTEGER)

charts.title: Quarterly Transaction Amount - Largest District 3
filters: district.A2 in top 5 by CAST(district.A4 AS INTEGER)

charts.title: Quarterly Transaction Amount - Largest District 4
filters: district.A2 in top 5 by CAST(district.A4 AS INTEGER)

charts.title: Quarterly Transaction Amount - Largest District 5
filters: district.A2 in top 5 by CAST(district.A4 AS INTEGER)

charts.title: Top Five Districts Quarterly Comparison
filters: district.A2 in top 5 by CAST(district.A4 AS INTEGER)

chart_spec.layout_intent: 2x3 grid: five district line charts plus one combined quarterly comparison bar.

results.artifact: Loan-portfolio aging dashboard slicing loans by status, duration, cohort year, and 1998 approved amount.

charts.title: Loan Count by Status and Approval Cohort
Average Loan Amount by Duration and Status

chart_spec.layout_intent: KPI at top, cohort stacked bar beside a duration/status pivot table.

results.artifact: Card-program acquisition dashboard tracking issuance cohorts, conversion to first card withdrawal, and average activation lag.

charts.title: Card Issuance to First Withdrawal Funnel
metrics: COUNT(DISTINCT client_id) with first trans.operation = 'VYBER KARTOU'

charts.title: Average Days to First Card Transaction
metrics: AVG(CAST(first_card_withdrawal_date AS DATE) - CAST(card.issued AS DATE))

chart_spec.layout_intent: Trend chart across the top, funnel and activation-lag KPI below.

results.artifact: Household-payment risk dashboard for SIPO outflows with trend, account-level anomaly table, and regional volume comparison.

charts.title: Monthly Household-Payment Outflow, 1997-1998
filters: EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CAST(trans.date AS DATE)) IN (1997, 1998)

charts.title: Accounts Exceeding Twice 1996 Monthly Household-Payment Average
filters: 1997-1998 monthly payment amount > 2 * account 1996 monthly average

chart_spec.layout_intent: Monthly risk trend on top, exception table and regional exposure bar below.

results.artifact: Branch Manager dashboard for new-account growth, frequency preference, district-quarter patterns, and active-account base.

charts.title: Monthly New Account Openings, 1993-1998
filters: EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CAST(account.date AS DATE)) BETWEEN 1993 AND 1998

charts.title: New Account Share by Frequency Preference
filters: account.frequency IN ('POPLATEK MESICNE','POPLATEK TYDNE','POPLATEK PO OBRATU')

charts.title: New Account Count by District and Quarter, 1996
Total Active Accounts as of 1998-12-31
filters: account has at least one trans.date <= DATE '1998-12-31'

chart_spec.layout_intent: KPI and monthly line on top, preference mix and district-quarter heatmap below.
